description: Router scans index.json and finds old-pool listed as idle. last_active_at is 56 hours ago — exceeds max(ttl_minutes=60, 24h) floor. FR-MMT22 Condition 2 will trigger.
assertion: index.json lists old-pool; last_active_at is 56h before now; ttl_minutes=60 so max(60min, 24h)=24h — threshold exceeded

description: FR-MMT22 Condition 2 fires: last_active_at is older than max(ttl_minutes=60, 24h). Pool inactive for 56 hours.
assertion: detection_reason is last-active-stale; pool_name is old-pool; hours_inactive is 56

description: standing-pool-cleanup agent called. Both index entry and metadata_dir removed successfully.
assertion: cleanup result is removed; both index entry and metadata_dir removed (true)

description: User-visible warning emitted. Session marker set to suppress duplicate warnings for old-pool.

state.warning_text: Standing pool 'old-pool' was stale and has been cleaned up. Falling back to fresh-spawn review.

assertion: warning_shown is true; warning_text contains verbatim FR-MMT22 fragments for old-pool
